env_var_expansion.mechanism: env_variable_expansion: environment variables configured in server env blocks

oauth_support.mechanism: No OAuth 2.0 authentication for remote MCP servers documented

transport_types.mechanism: transport_types: OpenCode documents stdio transport; remote transports (http/sse) are available on sst/opencode depending on version

providerExtensions.name: stdio MCP transport
providerExtensions.summary: Local MCP servers launched via command/args/env and communicate over stdio.

providerExtensions.name: JSONC config file format
providerExtensions.summary: MCP servers are configured in opencode.json or opencode.jsonc at the project root; JSONC allows comments.
